summary: The balcony appears modern and in clean decorative order overall, with composite decking, metal balustrading and painted external walls/soffits presented in a generally tidy state. No significant damage is visible in the photographs, and the space appears well maintained with only light, incidental outdoor use evident. The interior door and glazing visible to the balcony also appear in good condition.

items.name: Balcony decking
items.description: Grey composite decking boards laid lengthways across the balcony floor.
defects: Light surface wear consistent with external use; no distinct damage visible

items.name: Balcony balustrade
items.description: Black painted metal balustrade with vertical bars and square top rail to the balcony edge.

items.name: Balcony walls
items.description: Painted external walls in off-white/cream finish to the balcony side and rear.

items.name: Balcony ceiling/soffit
items.description: Painted external soffit/underside of the balcony above, off-white finish.

items.name: Sliding glazed door
items.description: Large floor-to-ceiling sliding glazed door with dark metal frame providing access from the interior to the balcony.

items.name: Door frame and threshold strip
items.description: Dark metal/aluminium door frame and low threshold to the sliding door opening.

items.name: External window glazing
items.description: Adjacent floor-to-ceiling glazed panel/window with dark frame to the balcony elevation.

items.name: Window frame
items.description: Dark metal/aluminium frame to the external glazed opening.

items.name: Balcony light fitting
items.description: Round recessed ceiling downlights visible under the soffit at the balcony entrance/covered area.

items.name: Vent grille
items.description: Linear external ventilation grille set high level above the balcony door area.

items.name: Internal sofa visible through door
items.description: Grey upholstered sofa partially visible inside the property through the open sliding door.

items.name: Coffee table visible through door
items.description: Small round table with light top and dark slender base visible inside the property through the open sliding door.

items.name: Pendant lights visible through door
items.description: Two decorative pendant light fittings visible inside the property through the open sliding door, with warm illumination.

items.name: Kitchen units visible through door
items.description: Modern dark fitted kitchen cabinetry visible inside the property through the open sliding door.
